The '''''Jumimi''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] used by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. The ''Jumimi'' was part of an attempt to destroy the [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[ZA-13]]. However, the cruiser was destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Behind the scenes==
In [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''TIE Fighter'']] the ''Jumimi'' was called ''Z-Jumimi'' to remind the player that it was under the command of Zaarin, but in the [[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide|game guide]] it was erroneously called ''Gemini''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
